scripts.dev:all: pnpm run dev:exchange & pnpm run dev:bot & pnpm run dev:web
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:exchange && pnpm run build:bot && pnpm --filter @crispy/web build
scripts.lint:rust: cd apps/exchange && cargo clippy -- -W clippy::pedantic && cd ../bot && cargo clippy -- -W clippy::pedantic
scripts.lint:all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:rust && pnpm run check:lines
scripts.test:rust: pnpm run test:exchange && pnpm run test:bot
scripts.test: pnpm run test:web && pnpm run test:rust
scripts.check:precommit: pnpm lint:all && pnpm test && pnpm build:all
